data.name: Lucky Bastard
data.detailed_description:
You’re not a hero. You’re just a lucky bastard. But luck is a fickle thing.

A ruthless adult visual novel where success demands sacrifice — love, loyalty, or worse.

An adult visual novel soaked in dirty morality and sexual freedom. The protagonist is a man in his 40s — once a decent businessman, now consumed by greed and the hunger for power. At the start, he’s a big child with a “take what you can” philosophy. Women are just a source of pleasure. He’s married, but never faithful. He manipulates, dominates, and sacrifices others for a deal that could bring obscene wealth.

But everything changes when he loses his anchor — his assistant Julia. The woman who was his mirror and moral compass is gone. Now, he must crawl through a web of sex, lies, betrayal, and power — with no guide, and no safety net.

The player decides who he becomes:

  • A man destroyed by his own sins, seeking redemption

  • A seducer of a powerful investor’s wife

  • A fool who realizes the cost of loyalty too late

  • A broken soul saved by someone he once despised

  • Or a man who dies without ever changing

Features:

  • A branching storyline with multiple endings

  • Explicit 18+ scenes without censorship

  • Deep characters who shape the story

  • Over 4 hours of gameplay

  • 6,000+ renders and 350 animations

data.short_description: Married, immoral, and nearly broke — but with a brilliant plan to get rich. Luck favors bastards, but not forever. Sex, intrigue, betrayal, and questionable morals. Manipulate, seduce, or save yourself — your path leads to lust, redemption, or reckoning.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 芬蘭文, 瑞典文, 俄文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or Newer
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0-capable graphics card/integrated GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：8.0
  • 儲存空間: 5000 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: 10 or Newer
  • 處理器: Requires a 64-bit processor
  • 記憶體: 4000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0-capable graphics card/integrated GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：8.0
  • 儲存空間: 5000 MB 可用空間
